defs: A state or quality of lasting or duration; lastingness; continuance.
quotes: Slurring with an evasive answer the question concerning the endurance of his own possession.

defs: The act of bearing or suffering; a continuing under pain or distress without resistance, or without being overcome; sufferance; patience.
quotes: Their fortitude was most admirable in their patience and endurance of all evils, of pain and of death.
